hooks.command: sh -c 'D=$(TZ=America/New_York date +%u); T=$(TZ=America/New_York date +%H%M); if [ "$D" -le 5 ] && [ "$T" -ge 0955 ] && [ "$T" -le 1400 ]; then echo "[auto-rearm] Weekday market hours (NY $T). If this session has the TradingView MCP, re-arm the Trend Join Long scanner per tjl_scanner.json: CronCreate the every-30-min 10:00-14:00 Mon-Fri loop with notification gating, then run one tick."; fi'
